reviews.review_title: Not possoble to view own stl files
reviews.review_description:
I can only see 4 models provided by the app even thou i have payed 17 eur for the app.

Can not see my stl files, cant really browse files - you only see one list of files which is not stored localy.


I bought the app to be able to view my stk files - so at it doesn't work and as it cannot be refunded - i absolutely don't recommend the app

This is an excellent presentation tool that integrates Mixed Reality (MR) technology with multi-user interaction. It is extremely easy to use, allowing users to load models, play animations, and collaborate effortlessly. Ideal for training, project demonstrations, and immersive presentations.
I can't believe it—my C4D and 3ds Max files can be viewed too. That's amazing!
Impossible to used menu is on the floor nothing to move it..... nul
So practical！！！！It makes my work more imaginative！like magic
